completed_projects.completion_summary: Fixed first-order logic proposition display by preserving Variable objects as Terms in lambda arguments and adding assignment parameter to find_proposition(). Quantifier operators (ForAll, Exists, Lambda) now pass variable assignments to body propositions for correct semantic evaluation.

completed_projects.completion_summary: Implemented well-formedness checking in the parser with two-level validation: syntactic category check rejects bare terms and lambda abstractions, closedness check rejects open formulas with free variables. Removed Task 19 workaround from structure.py. Added 80 new tests covering all validation scenarios.

completed_projects.completion_summary: Systematically updated all path references from uppercase (Code/, Docs/, Images/) to lowercase (code/, docs/, images/) across 130+ files in documentation, source code, Claude configuration, and miscellaneous locations. Test collection verified working with no regressions.

completed_projects.description: Check that ForAllOperator and ExistsOperator semantics in first-order operators.py follow the Logos manual (02-constitutive.typ and 03-dynamics.typ) where lambda handles all variable binding. Ensure ExistsOperator is defined in terms of ForAllOperator. Add \\all and \\some abbreviations that combine lambda binding with quantification. Add arity validation checks with meaningful error messages for formation problems.

artifacts.summary: Analysis of quantifier semantics showing ExistsOperator needs redefinition via ForAllOperator, missing \all/\some abbreviations, and missing formation validation
Supplementary research analyzing bracket notation, Church-style vs direct binding quantification, and four design options for aligning ModelChecker with Logos manual
5-phase plan implementing Option B (True Church-Style): parser desugaring, ForAllOperator arity-1, ExistsOperator duality, validation, documentation
Implementation summary for Church-style quantifier refactoring with 39 new tests

completed_projects.completion_summary: Implemented True Church-Style quantifiers (Option B) - parser desugars \forall v.phi to \forall(\lambda v.phi), both quantifier operators refactored to arity-1 with lambda validation and clear error messages.

artifacts.summary: Research report with 6 major findings on vocabulary auto-discovery architecture
Clean-break analysis identifying plan restructuring to unify sentence letters as zero-arity predicates
Comparison of plans 001/002/003 identifying arity validation and equivalence testing as items to restore in plan 003
v004: v003 + arity consistency validation in Phase 3
Implementation summary with syntax reference and verification results

completed_projects.completion_summary: Implemented Task 14 auto-discovery of predicates/functions/constants. Modified parser to treat bare identifiers as constants (equivalent to P<>), requiring [] syntax for predicates (P[] for zero-arity). Added vocabulary collection with arity validation that raises ValueError on conflicts. Updated semantic evaluation to reject truth evaluation of constants. All 173 unit tests pass.

completed_projects.description: Strengthen test coverage for first-order parser and vocabulary discovery. Original scope (tasks 7-9): add integration tests connecting term algebra to parser (free_variables on parsed formulas), expand lambdaApp tests to cover substitute(), add parser error handling tests (malformed input: missing body after quantifier, unclosed brackets, invalid variable names), and add TDD-conformant placeholder tests for task 7 operator stubs. Extended scope (task 14): add comprehensive tests for the new syntax convention (bare identifiers as constants, [] required for predicates), vocabulary auto-discovery edge cases, arity validation error paths, and semantic TypeError for constant truth evaluation.

artifacts.summary: Identified 30 missing tests across 5 categories: 14 parser error handling tests, 5 parser-term integration tests, 3 lambdaApp tests, 6 vocabulary edge case tests, and 2 semantic handling tests

completed_projects.completion_summary: Added 37 new tests across 5 test classes covering parser error handling (21 tests), parser-term algebra integration (5 tests), lambdaApp substitute behavior (3 tests), vocabulary auto-discovery edge cases (6 tests), and semantic constant handling (2 tests). All tests pass with no regressions.

No additional implementation required.

artifacts.summary: Research report analyzing parser extension requirements for first-order syntax including variables, functions, predicates, and quantifier binding

Implementation summary documenting all changes, verification results, and architecture notes

completed_projects.completion_summary: Extended ModelChecker parser for first-order syntax with lambda-binding architecture. Implemented tokenize_first_order(), parse_term(), parse_first_order_expression() supporting variables, constants, functions, predicates, lambda abstractions/applications, and quantifiers. Integrated with Sentence class while maintaining full backward compatibility. Created 45 unit tests covering all syntactic forms.

Follows constitutive README pattern with navigation, semantic theory, implementation status, dependencies, and references sections.
